Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT baseline."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(baseline.weight) AS units_count, sum(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", sum(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND baseline.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/e74a58b99ef62fb9dccd58bf42e2ad340cc2744ea6fe16db45d3e49867134f58/184b069e-606d-48b8-bf8b-1433a2589bcd/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
